arts.ttl: Unai Emery insists 'the moment was not right' for Aston Villa transfer
arts.sum: Unai Emery is delighted Ollie Watkins realises that Aston Villa is the best place for him to play his football at this moment in his career after the striker told the Spaniard he was happy to stay at the club amid interest from Arsenal. "Every professional has our own ambitions in our career, but there are also moments like this in our career," Emery explained on Friday.

arts.ttl: 'This morning': What TalkSPORT journalist has just heard about Arsenal's bid for Ollie Watkins at Aston Villa
arts.sum: Arsenal made a remarkable move this week when they made a bit for Ollie Watkins from Aston Villa. Arsenal made a big-money offer for Watkins...

arts.ttl: Saturday’s briefing: Real reunion for Man City as Aston Villa eye Rashford swoop
arts.sum: Real Madrid and City will meet in the Champions League for the fifth two-legged tie in six seasons.

arts.ttl: 'Disappointed' - Unai Emery reveals true feelings about Jhon Duran after £65m transfer - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: Unai Emery admits he is a little disappointed Jhon Duran chose to leave Aston Villa for Saudi Pro League side Al-Nassr. I accept some players leave for there.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Ollie Watkins makes decision on future as Alexander Isak sent warning
arts.sum: There are a handful of deals that are in the pipeline for Arsenal but time is running out to get a transfer completed that would give the team a huge boost in the Premier League title race

arts.ttl: Watkins has told me he wants to stay at Villa - Emery
arts.sum: Striker Ollie Watkins tells boss Unai Emery he wants to stay at Aston Villa and reject interest from Arsenal.

arts.ttl: 'Not normal' - Unai Emery makes 'fast' Aston Villa transfer demand as deadline looms - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: Asked if Villa want to sign a striker to replace Duran, Emery responded: "The club is working, identifying if we can sign a striker to help us. Unai Emery has revealed Aston Villa could bring in three new players before Monday's 11pm deadline, but admits the club's busy final three days in the market is "not normal".

arts.ttl: Aston Villa interested in signing Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford
arts.sum: The 27-year-old has fallen out of favour at Old Trafford.
